actions.value:
Hi {{ticket.requester.first_name}},

 

Bity is our partner which services SEPA bank transfers, so we will need to get in contact with them regarding this issue. I believe you should have received an email from them for any outstanding orders (please check your junk/spam email folders) which will have included an order number.

 

If you have the order number, you may enter it here to check the current status: https://sophia.bity.com

 

If you need further assistance with your account or any existing orders, please reach out to Bity directly and include your IBAN information so they can find your order information - Edge does not have access to personal information or your records with Bity.

 

Email Support: support_edge@bity.com

Chat Support: www.bity.com

Hi {{current_user.first_name}} and Bity,
 
Bity is our partner which services SEPA bank transfers, so we will need to get in contact with them regarding this issue. I believe you should have received an email from them for any outstanding orders (please check your junk/spam email folders) which will have included an order number.
 
If you have the order number, you may enter it here to check the current status: https://sophia.bity.com
 
If you need further assistance with your account or any existing orders, please reach out to Bity directly and include your IBAN information so they can find your order information - Edge does not have access to personal information or your records with Bity.
 
Email Support: support_edge@bity.com
Chat Support: www.bity.com
